calendar.matters:
Petition To Establish Beneficiaries Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Mar-07-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Rooney for Sherry Fetterolf.

Mr. Rooney stated that Sherry did not received the $3,000.00, that the issue was not discovered until February of 2012, that notice was not provided to Sherry because she is not a named Beneficiary, and that the named Beneficiaries want to have that money restored to the Trust. The Petition to Establish Beneficiaries Claim of Ownership, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Establish Beneficiaries Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Jan-29-2014 Continued To Feb-05-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Establish Beneficiaries Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust And Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Continued To Jan-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Rooney for Sherry Fetterolf (Petitioner). Paul Phillips (Agent udner POA for Sherry Fetterolf).

The Court expressed concern with regard to the publication that has no mention of Barbara Comer's name. Mr. Rooney stated that they are unable to locate Ms. Comer and that she has fled to Mexico. Mr. Phillips stated that Sherry did not receive the $3,000.00 for the purchase of the electric chair and that he has filed criminal charges against Barbara Comer. The Court addressed the issue with regard to publication and its requirement. Mr. Rooney presented oral argument in support of his position on publication, that notice may have been mailed to Ms. Comer and that he requested to have the claim amount reduced to a judgment. The Court instructed Mr. Rooney to file a declaration addressing the publication issue, attorney fees, calculation of interest and any other authority to consider by January 24, 2014. Mr. Phillips will file a declaration stating that Sherry did not receive the funds. The matter was continued to January 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Rooney for Beneficiaries.

The Court informed Counsel that personal service to Barbara Corner is required and that it needs to see that efforts have been made to serve her personally. The Petiton to Establish Beneficiaries Claim of Ownership to Property, etc. was continued to October 7, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris. (Not Reported)
